g.text: Bob Group Keys: [{ <Group ID> : (<msg key>, <public admin key>, None) }]
Alice Keys: [{ <Group ID> : (<msg key>, <public admin key>, <private admin key>) }]
Carol Group Keys: [{ <Group ID> : (<msg key>, <public admin key>, None) }]
- Admin Public key (all group members know this)
- Admin Private key (only admins know this)
- Usernames are a good enough way to prove your public key is legitimate
- All Admins can add/remove Members and other Admins
